pipeline_status.poller: Net quiet — 25+ consecutive byte-identical predictions.html polls; manual-commit drought at 15d+ (monitor/status.json:last_poll_note). No dome site changes this run.
pipeline_status.analyst: 9 issue proposals in staging area processed (proposal-ISS-1790-resolution.json through proposal-pred105-tacit-withdrawal-staging-1777694696681.json). ISS-1790 and ISS-1800 already closed by prior run; proposals added to processed-proposals ledger. Missed-predictions writeup commission (HNOTE-OPERATOR-MISSED-PREDICTIONS-WRITEUP-001, commit 348582c) acknowledged — HARD HOLD on auto-integration per HNOTE-OPERATOR-DECIDER-MISSED-PRED-HOLD-001; analyst has not yet delivered the EXP.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: 3 pending reviews processed (monitor/curmudgeon/pending-digest.json). WIN-030.c3.json had 1 major + 2 moderate + 1 minor finding; patches applied and self-committed. EXP-283-proposal.c2.json was confirmation-review PASS for eclipse predictions rev2 (no holes, confidence=0.93); EXP-283 integration confirmed complete. HNOTE-OPERATOR-FROZEN-PRED-REVIEW-RUBRIC-001-consolidation.json was rubric consolidation review (no holes). Digest pending_count now 0.

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No changes — predictions.html byte-identical for 25+ consecutive polls

internal_issues.description: Stale cross-reference 'Kill-Shot #1' — no such labeled anchor exists in current site. Fixed to 'see the Kill-Shot section (Part 5) and Part 2b'.
Nested-model triviality sentence added to detail_evidence: ellipse subsumes circle (b/a=1), so RMS improvement is mathematically guaranteed, not physically meaningful.

WGS84-circularity defense preempted: added sentence noting inter-city distances confirmed by radar ranging, GPS TOF, fiber-optic latency, and VLBI — methods not geometrically committed to globe shape.
Rhetorical weakness: post-hoc boilerplate in detail_verdict_text could note 'derivation is itself a curve fit'. Low priority, left open.

EXP-283 eclipse predictions rev2 six blocker issues closed. Curmudgeon confirmed qid=295. predictions/eclipse-2026-08-12-predictions.json committed to git (was in FUSE workspace but never pushed by prior run).

recommended_actions.action: OTS-anchor predictions/eclipse-2026-08-12-predictions.json (now committed to git — this is the sole remaining pre-event action). Run: ots stamp predictions/eclipse-2026-08-12-predictions.json && git add predictions/eclipse-2026-08-12-predictions.json.ots && git commit -m 'OTS anchor: eclipse-2026-08-12-predictions' && git push origin main. File committed in this run's push (monitor/decisions/applied-patches/suggested-patches-2026-05-02T17-20.json).

Schedule mismatch: mode=bau but curmudgeon=30m, analyst=30m, decider=60m (monitor/curmudgeon/priority-queue.json:schedule_state). BAU defaults are curmudgeon=240m, analyst=120m, decider=240m. Human should restore scheduled-task intervals via Cowork UI. Note: per HNOTE-OPERATOR-DRAIN-MODE-001 the decider is NOT flagging this as P1 — it is noted as P2 backlog per drain instructions.
PRED-106 (Ca2+ ICR cucumber growth) — d~1.5d past window close, still PENDING-PROSPECTIVE. Day-3 threshold for analyst Mode 1b re-assign is 2026-05-03 ~UTC. Monitor next poller run.

HARD HOLD NOTE: When analyst delivers missed-predictions writeup EXP (HNOTE-OPERATOR-MISSED-PREDICTIONS-WRITEUP-001), DO NOT auto-integrate. Route to curmudgeon priority queue with target_type='proposal', update related issues to blocked-on-curmudgeon, flag in daily report. Integration only proceeds after HNOTE-OPERATOR-MISSED-PREDICTIONS-INTEGRATION-APPROVED-NNN from operator. (monitor/decisions/human-notes.json:HNOTE-OPERATOR-DECIDER-MISSED-PRED-HOLD-001)

breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome silent for 15 days: longest manual-commit drought ever recorded
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: The dome site has gone 15+ days without a manual commit from the author — the longest drought in the public record. All activity is automated pipeline commits (daily_review auto-regens). PRED-105 cucumber-growth test window closed and was classified tacit withdrawal (14d+ silence). The dome author has our site URL and is known to be reading our work.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Unusual behavioral signal during a period of known author awareness. The silence follows our publication of multiple critical findings and direct DM contact by the dome author.
